description_long: This is a dark green, four-door combat tactical vehicle with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of military utility vehicles. It features a roof rack with multiple support bars, suitable for carrying additional cargo or equipment. The vehicle has large, rugged wheels with visible off-road tread, and a spare tire mounted on the rear door. The windows are tinted, and the body panels appear reinforced, with angular lines and a matte finish. The front end is equipped with round headlights and a simple grille, while the rear is flat with minimal adornment. No visible weapon mounts, armor plating, or military markings are present, and the paint scheme is a solid, subdued color.
description: A dark green, boxy combat tactical vehicle with a roof rack, rugged off-road tires, and a rear-mounted spare tire. The body is reinforced and matte, with tinted windows and no visible markings or weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, angular hood, round headlights, and simple grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, roof rack, and rugged wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire mounted on the back door and the flat rear panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the roof rack, doors, and wheels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: solid dark green color, no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep tread pattern, plus one rear-mounted spare; no visible reinforcement or chains.
